artifactsReviewed.relevance: MonthlyRevenue consumer integration complete. 60/60 tests. Integration surface confirmed. entersAlphaScore=false hardcoded.
Decision matrix for MonthlyRevenue(PROMOTE), NewsEvent(PROMOTE-pending), FinancialReport(BLOCK), Chip(DEFER).

keyFacts.MonthlyRevenue: PROMOTE — releaseDate coverage complete, PIT confidence LOW (INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH). P36+P37 consumer integration complete.
keyFacts.NewsEvent: PROMOTE-pending — 1018/1018 rows, publishedAt RECORDED_FROM_SOURCE (strongest PIT). Source diversity 84% Yahoo RSS concern.
keyFacts.FinancialReport: BLOCK — missing releaseDate, releaseDateSource, releaseDateConfidence. 957 rows all Q4 2025.
keyFacts.Chip: DEFER — availableAt field absent. Migration requires authorization.

artifactsReviewed.relevance: NewsEvent source-present dry-run. 1018/1018 READY. publishedAt PIT gate. PIT anomalies=0. FULL_CONFORMANCE.
artifactsReviewed.keyFact: NewsEvent PIT gate = RECORDED_FROM_SOURCE (strongest confidence). Source diversity concern noted but not blocking dry-run.

artifactsReviewed.relevance: FinancialReport: 957 rows, 0 ready, MISSING_PIT_METADATA_FIELDS. NewsEvent: 1018 rows, 1018 ready.
artifactsReviewed.keyFact: FinancialReport blockReason = MISSING_PIT_METADATA_FIELDS. Schema has no releaseDate field at all.

artifactsReviewed.relevance: CEO mandate: next round MUST touch src/. Designated P0 = MonthlyRevenue Feature Consumer (which became P36+P37).
artifactsReviewed.keyFact: P38 follows from P37 completion. P38 builds readiness classification — no simulation execution.

MonthlyRevenue.rationale: P36+P37 consumer integration complete. releaseDate PIT gate present (INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH, LOW confidence). 2143 rows FULL_CONFORMANCE. entersAlphaScore=false enforced.
MonthlyRevenue.conditions: paperOnly=true enforced. No simulation execution until P39+ authorization.

NewsEvent.rationale: 1018/1018 source-present rows READY. publishedAt PIT gate RECORDED_FROM_SOURCE (HIGH confidence). BUT: NLP quality not validated, symbol linkage not validated, source diversity 84% Yahoo RSS.
NewsEvent.conditions: Cannot be simulation input until NLP quality audit and source diversity analysis complete.

FinancialReport.rationale: 957 rows, 0 ready. Schema has no releaseDate, releaseDateSource, releaseDateConfidence. createdAt is ingestion timestamp only. Authorization required for migration.
FinancialReport.conditions: Explicit authorization: YES apply FinancialReport releaseDate migration to dev DB.

Chip.rationale: availableAt field absent from schema. Migration requires authorization. Lag evidence (distribution lag from production) not validated.
Chip.conditions: Explicit authorization required before any schema change.

Quote.rationale: Quote OHLCV data — generally PIT-safe if date alignment confirmed. Not explicitly assessed in P33-P37 phases.

Regime.rationale: MarketRegime classification — depends on whether regime determination is PIT-safe.
